common.signOutConfirm: You'll be returned to the login page. Any unsaved changes will be lost.

auth.subtitle: Use your university Google account to get started. No password needed.
auth.accessNote: Eidolon is currently available to students with an approved account. Sign in with your Google account — if you have access, you'll be redirected automatically.
auth.tagline: AI-powered lecture notes for students who actually want to learn, not just survive.
auth.bySigningIn: By signing in you agree to fair use of the service.

notes.title: Inclass Notes
notes.subtitle: Your generated notes and group library.
notes.generateNotes: Generate structured study notes from your lecture transcripts.
notes.noNotesYet: No individual notes yet. Generate one to get started.
notes.deleteNoteConfirm: This note will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
notes.examNoteDesc: Ultra-condensed for limited exam note allowances. Definitions, key terms, and formulas only — no elaboration.
notes.standardDesc: A high-level overview of the lecture. Perfect for quick reviews, but heavily summarizes complex concepts and skips granular details.
notes.textbookDesc: The go-to choice for learning the material. A comprehensive, detailed breakdown with full explanations and examples. Nothing gets left behind.
notes.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
notes.uploadTxtOrPick: Upload a .txt file or pick from your transcripts
notes.uploadFileOrSelectExisting: Upload a file or select from your existing transcripts

transcriptor.title: Audio Transcriptor
transcriptor.subtitle: Upload your lecture audio and get a clean transcript via Whisper.
transcriptor.label: Label
transcriptor.turboDesc: Fast & efficient — great for most audio
transcriptor.premiumDesc: Premium accuracy for complex or noisy audio
transcriptor.plainTextDesc: Clean transcript, easy to copy and edit.
transcriptor.withTimestampsDesc: Includes segment timestamps — great for subtitles or navigation.
transcriptor.switchToTimestamps: Switch to 'With Timestamps' format to enable speaker identification
transcriptor.turboMayHallucinate: ⚠️ Turbo model may hallucinate speakers. Switch to V3 Large for accuracy.
transcriptor.silenceRemoval: Removes silence and non-speech audio for cleaner transcripts.
transcriptor.whisperV3LargeAccurate: Whisper V3 Large provides much more accurate speaker diarization with fewer hallucinations.
transcriptor.deleteTranscriptConfirm: This transcript will be permanently deleted. Any notes that used it as a source will lose the link.
transcriptor.errorTranscriptionFailed: Transcription failed. Check your file format and try again.
transcriptor.errorConnection: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.
transcriptor.enableDiarization: Enable to identify who said what in multi-speaker audio.
transcriptor.errorDelete: Something went wrong. Please try again.

audioConverter.title: Audio Converter
audioConverter.subtitle: Extract audio from your lecture recording. Free — nothing is stored on the server.
audioConverter.leaveBlank: Leave blank to convert the full file.
audioConverter.saveConverted: Save the converted audio file to your device.
audioConverter.autoSendTranscriptor: Automatically send to Transcriptor when done.
audioConverter.saveAndQueue: Save the file and queue transcription simultaneously.
audioConverter.mp3Recommended: MP3 is recommended for Whisper transcription.
audioConverter.bitrateHint: 192 kbps balances quality and file size.
audioConverter.turboFaster: Turbo is faster and cheaper for most lectures.
audioConverter.timestampsHint: Timestamps enable word-level timing in the viewer.
audioConverter.errorDownloadRef: Download reference lost. Please convert again.
audioConverter.errorFileExpired: Your file has expired. Please convert again.
audioConverter.errorConversionFailed: Conversion failed. Check your file format and try again.
audioConverter.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

examPrep.title: Exam Prep
examPrep.subtitle: Your generated practice questions and group library.
examPrep.generateExamPrep: Generate structured practice material from existing notes or transcripts.
examPrep.noExamPrepsYet: No individual exam preps yet. Generate one to get started.
examPrep.label: Label
examPrep.deleteExamPrepConfirm: This exam prep will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
examPrep.editLabelHint: This is the title shown on the exam prep.
examPrep.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one note or upload a file to continue.
examPrep.orClickToBrowse: or click to browse · multiple allowed
examPrep.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
examPrep.tfDesc: Statements testing whether a core concept is correct or not.
examPrep.mcqDesc: One correct answer among several plausible distractors.
examPrep.theoryDesc: Open-ended questions requiring written explanation of concepts.
examPrep.scenarioDesc: Case-based questions requiring applied analysis and judgment.
examPrep.calculationDesc: Numerical problems solved with step-by-step computation.
examPrep.easyDesc: Recall and basic comprehension. Good for first-pass review.
examPrep.normalDesc: Mirrors typical exam difficulty. Recommended for most use cases.
examPrep.hardDesc: Application, analysis and edge cases. Good for deep preparation.

groups.title: Groups
groups.studyTogetherSubtitle: Join a group to automatically split generation costs, or create your own and earn the generator discount.
groups.createGroupDesc: Start a new study pool. You'll be admin, manage invites, and earn the 50% discount when you generate notes for the group.
groups.joinExistingDesc: Enter an invite code from your group admin to link your balance to the shared pool.
groups.leaveGroupConfirm: You'll lose access to all group-generated content. You can rejoin later with the invite code.
groups.renameGroupHint: This name is visible to all members.
groups.billingDesc: Generation costs are split equally among all members. Whoever clicks Generate receives a 50% discount on their share for managing the run.
groups.kickConfirm: They'll be removed from the group immediately and lose access to group content.

pricing.title: Pay only for what you use
pricing.subtitle: Credit-based — top up once, spend as you go.
pricing.topUpInstantly: Top up instantly with any major credit or debit card. Credits are added to your account immediately after payment.

topup.title: Top Up
topup.subtitle: Select a package or enter a custom amount.
topup.poweredByStripe: Powered by Stripe · Visa & Mastercard accepted globally
topup.creditsAddedInstantly: Credits are added instantly after payment confirmation.
topup.processedSecurely: All transactions are processed securely by Stripe.
topup.pricingInUsd: Pricing is in USD. Local currency amounts shown are approximate.
topup.nonRefundable: Top-ups are non-refundable once credited to your account.
topup.paymentSuccessful: Payment successful! Credits have been added.
topup.fxNotice: Local amounts are approximate and updated daily. Charges are always processed in USD.
topup.redirect_msg: You'll be redirected to Stripe's secure checkout to complete payment.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently deletes your account, all generated notes, transcripts, and activity history. Your remaining balance will be forfeited and cannot be refunded.
profile.deleteAccountModalSubtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmText: Type delete my account to confirm
profile.referralSub: Share your link — when someone signs up through it, you earn 30% of the profit they generate for the platform.

pricingPage.title: Pay only for what you
pricingPage.subtitle: Credit-based — top up once, spend as you go.
pricingPage.groupGenSubtext: Group generation costs are automatically split across all members' credit balances. The member who clicks generate pays
pricingPage.topupDesc1: Top up instantly with any major credit or debit card. Credits are added to your account
pricingPage.footerNote1: Credits are deducted at generation time. A
pricingPage.footerNote2: balance check runs before every generation
pricingPage.footerNote5: Token counts include both input and output. Top up instantly via card — credits land
pricingPage.q1: When does my balance get charged?
pricingPage.a1p1: Your credit balance is checked and deducted
pricingPage.a1p2: a note or run transcription. If your balance is too low,
pricingPage.a1p3: — you'll see an error asking you to top up first.
pricingPage.a3p1: Costs are split automatically across all group members. If anyone lacks sufficient credits, the generation won't run. The member who clicks generate gets a
pricingPage.a3p2: on their share, subsidized by the rest of the group.
pricingPage.q4: Why do note costs vary? What determines my tier?
pricingPage.a4p2: (input transcript + AI output combined). Longer lectures with denser content produce more tokens. A typical 2–3 hour lecture usually falls in
pricingPage.q5: Why is transcription priced separately from notes?
pricingPage.a5p1: Transcription uses Whisper (priced by audio duration), while notes use a language model priced by token count. They run independently — if you already have a transcript,
pricingPage.a6p1: Top up with any major credit or debit card via Stripe. Credits are added
